=====================================================

+Solar Return Chart — Birth Data-------------------------+
| Field              | Value                             |

| Name               | Sample Natal Subject Solar Return |
| Return Type        | Solar                             |
| City               | Liverpool                         |
| Nation             | GB                                |
| Latitude           | 53.4084°                          |
| Longitude          | -2.9916°                          |
| Timezone           | Europe/London                     |
| Day of Week        | Sunday                            |
| ISO Local Datetime | 1991-07-21T20:33:06+01:00         |
